{{Quote|Like the point of a duha spear, like the blade of a knife, strrrength lies where metal comes to a point.|Ducilla Brarun|<ref name="Balance Point" />}}
'''Duha spears''' were a type of [[Spear/Legends|spear]] that had a metal point at the end. In a<ref name="Balance Point" /> [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> speech, [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Anti-Jedi sentiment/Legends|anti-Jedi]] agitator and [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Ducilla Brarun]] used the point of a duha spear as an example of strength when expressing her conviction that the people of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] could survive the Yuuzhan Vong [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] only by standing apart from the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="Balance Point" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1stm}}
